name: Streusel Pound Cake/cp
recipeInstructions:
If you are using a 3-quart crockpot, it is recommended that a 2 lb. coffee can be used. For a larger crockpot (5-quart), use a 9-cup Bundt pan or a 2 lb. coffee can.
1. Mix pound cake according to package instructions.
2. Pour half of the batter into the prepared coffee can, whichever size you are using.
3. Combine streusel ingredients and sprinkle half over the cake batter.
4. Add the remaining batter and top with the rest of the streusel.
5. Place the can or pan in the crockpot.
6. Cover the top of the can with 8 paper towels.
7. Cover and cook on HIGH for 3 to 4 hours. If using a Bundt pan, bake for 2 to 3 hours.
